company.name_jp: 株式会社中央システム開発

notes.website_issue: The company website (csyk.co.jp) returned DNS NXDOMAIN, indicating the domain may not be active. This could mean the company has changed its domain, merged with another entity, or the URL provided was incorrect.
notes.location_context: The company is located in Fujisawa City's Tsujido area, near Terrace Mall Shonan and the Fujisawa Sustainable Smart Town development project.
notes.business_context: The company operates in the IT services sector in Kanagawa Prefecture, focusing on contract software development, embedded systems, and SES (System Engineering Services).
